Proto Indo European religion is the religion of the [[Proto Indo Europeans]]

It included worship of all three members of [[Alo]] according to the trifunctional hypothesis

[[Category:Proto Indo Europeans]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
